en: I hate the kind of person that your whore mother turned me into.
Dennis, your mother is a dirty, dirty whore.
I mean, all during the 60s, before I met my whore wife, I was a boxer.
I just can't believe this. Hey, Dad, keep your voice down.
Matt, did you bang my whore wife?
Does anybody here have any illegitimate children with my whore wife that I should know about?
I mean, she probably went right from the clinic and banged some guy and got knocked up
because your mother was a giant whore.
You know what, dude? I don't believe you, Frank, all right?
You tell her she's a goddamn whore!
Always been a whore! I called Dennis. No, I'm not gonna be a whore, Frank.
You're already a whore. Why not make some money at it?
No, you're just gonna try and make me bang old ladies, and then you're gonna have me move on to dudes.
What, you got a problem? Yeah, this makes me seem like a whore. You are a whore.
No, I'm not a whore. I'm a handsome companion.
Oh, what do you think she's gonna do, call her husband and say she's banging a whore?
